creator: mita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Finally, I found that VFlib had been upgraded slightly.

I appreciate committer's work to forget two vflib patches that
I've sent at port/9097, and simply apply the patch obtained at:
http://www.jp.FreeBSD.org/~mita/ports-jp/ja-vflib-2.23-to-2.24.diff.gz

Sorry for your confusion.
---
MITA Yoshio
